snippet: Then, you can use this codemod to automatically migrate your code from Zod v3 to v4 syntax. This codemod also migrates .vue files containing Zod schemas.

name: A collection of useful codemods made by Codemod.com - GitHub
snippet: Codemods in this repo are written using jssg (JS ast-grep) — TypeScript transformation scripts that operate on ASTs generated by ast-grep.
